rationale: Despite IIT Roorkee CS education, the entire 2.1-year career is a single Operations Manager role at Infosys with accounting/compliance work, and MLflow/Databricks skills are implausibly listed with 56-month duration on a 25-month career — no actual ML or IR production experience.

Career is entirely non-technical sales/marketing roles across TCS, Wayne Enterprises (fictional), and Initech (fictional), with skills limited to Illustrator, Webpack, and React — zero ML, IR, or engineering relevance to this role.

Project Manager/Content Writer career across Dunder Mifflin (fictional), Initech (fictional), and Infosys with no ML or IR experience, and beginner-level data skills (Kafka, Spark) each under 9 months — no technical depth relevant to this role.

14.5-year career as Accountant/Sales/Graphic Designer entirely at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin x2, Initech x2) with no ML or engineering experience, and skills capped at beginner-level CSS, Redux, and Go with no IR or ranking exposure.

PhD from IIIT Hyderabad and solid data engineering background at upGrad (product company), but the 2.8-year career is focused on data warehousing (Snowflake/dbt) with self-directed ML projects rather than production IR, ranking, or embedding-based retrieval systems.

Career is HR Manager at a manufacturing firm and Civil Engineer at Wipro with no ML or IR work; YOLO listed as advanced skill is inconsistent with an HR/civil engineering background and signals keyword inflation.

5.8 years at product companies (InMobi AdTech, Glance, Haptik) with production recommendation systems using collaborative filtering and XGBoost, strong Python, and NLP work, but lacks explicit production experience with embeddings-based retrieval, vector databases, or ranking evaluation metrics like NDCG/MAP.

14.5-year career across entirely non-technical roles (Project Manager, Marketing Manager, Sales, HR) at multiple fictional companies (Initech, Pied Piper, Wayne Enterprises) with no ML, engineering, or IR experience whatsoever.

2.4-year career is entirely DevOps/full-stack at Accenture (IT services consulting) with only self-learner-level AI exposure (online courses, small RAG side project), providing no production ML or IR experience relevant to this role.

PhD from COEP Pune (tier_2) with advanced-rated Embeddings (46mo) and Information Retrieval (21mo) skills, plus production analytics service at Vedantu (product company), but career is primarily data engineering/analytics rather than dedicated IR or ranking system ownership.
